entries.reason: Optional real-world fixtures are not guaranteed to exist in every local checkout.
entries.condition: Skip only when the named real-world snapshot is missing from disk.

entries.reason: Optional captured URL snapshots are not guaranteed to exist in every local checkout.
entries.condition: Skip only when the named URL snapshot is missing from disk.

entries.titlePattern: ^real-world snapshot: (playwright-intro|mdn-wasm-text) stays within loose visual diff budget$
entries.reason: Actual paint export for the largest real-world snapshots currently exceeds CI latency budget. Extended to 2026-06-30 (aligned with the other paint-vrt entries) per GitHub issue #79: the substantive fix (commit playwright-intro / mdn-wasm-text snapshots and split the slow shard, or speed up capturePaintData) plus an expired-quarantine CI gate are tracked there and not yet done.
entries.condition: Skip only on CI until capturePaintData latency is reduced or the fixture is split.
